name: @concierge/widget
description: Embeddable, deliberately powerless landing-page chat widget. Drop-in React component with a cool default style and full overrides.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --clean --external react && pnpm build:embed
scripts.build:embed: tsup src/embed.tsx --format iife --global-name ConciergeEmbed --minify --no-dts --out-dir dist && mv dist/embed.global.js dist/concierge-embed.js
